check_details: missing marker: 'red red green green blue blue'

code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut cur = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if not string.is_empty(cur)
            out = "#{out}#{cur} #{cur} "
            cur = ""
          end
        else
          cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      out = "#{out}#{cur} #{cur} "
    end
    let olen = string.len(out)
    if olen > 0
      println(string.substring(out, 0, olen - 1))
    else
      println("")
    end
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
